name: Complete SaaS Lead Generation - Stripe + QuickBooks + n8n

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{"role": "user", "content": "Find {{ $json.leadCount }} {{ $json.customerData.targetLeads }}. For each lead, provide: name, company, title, LinkedIn profile (if available), email (if available), and a brief description of their role. Format as JSON array."}]

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role": "system", "content": "You are an expert sales copywriter. Create personalized outreach messages for lead generation."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Create a personalized outreach message for:

Lead: {{ $json.name }} at {{ $json.company }} ({{ $json.title }})
Business: {{ $json.businessContext }}
Target: {{ $json.targetCriteria }}

Generate:
1. Email subject line
2. Email body (professional, personalized, under 150 words)
3. LinkedIn message (under 100 words)
4. Follow-up message (under 100 words)

Format as JSON with fields: subject, email, linkedin, followup"}]

parameters.name: personalizations
parameters.value: =[{"to": [{"email": "{{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.customerData.email }}"}], "subject": "Your {{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.leadCount }} AI-Generated Leads Are Ready!"}]

parameters.name: content
parameters.value:
=[{"type": "text/html", "value": "

Your AI-Generated Leads Are Ready!

Hi {{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.customerData.firstName }},

Great news! We've successfully generated {{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.leadCount }} leads targeting: {{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.customerData.targetLeads }}

Your leads have been stored in Airtable and are ready for your outreach campaigns.

Best regards,
The Rensto Team

"}]

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "message": "Lead generation completed successfully",
  "leadsGenerated": {{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.leadCount }},
  "customerEmail": "{{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.customerData.email }}",
  "paymentIntentId": "{{ $('Validate Payment Data').first().json.paymentData.paymentIntentId }}",
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
